creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

Also, re: <https://old.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/tiit7y/-/i1g5s56/> it seems necessary to create a symbolic link: 

% file /usr/local/share/dtrace-toolkit/Man/man1
/usr/local/share/dtrace-toolkit/Man/man1: symbolic link to man1m
% cat /usr/local/etc/man.d/dtrace-toolkit.conf
MANPATH /usr/local/share/dtrace-toolkit/Man
% man execsnoop
%
